title: Oaks Capes
description: A simple lightweight cape renderer that allows for custom resources pack without requring a website
body:
A simple lightweight cape renderer mod that doesn't require a website to sync to or give personal information too.

## How to use

Firstly download a config mod. Open the mods config and you can change the value on. visit the [wiki](https://www.oakmods.com/wiki/capes) to see everything single cape texture and its vaule.

## Important Info
this mod also supports emssive textures for capes, this will not override any capes you are using it will only display IF you disble ur cape in the minecraft launcher or website

You can add more with a resource pack, this does support servers but it must be installed server side
